selection.selection_note: Judged only repaired icon batches 26 and 27 against standard_source_table semantic_brief plus S-101/OpenCPN/Aqua Map/provider witnesses and actual repaired SVG/renders on branch.

verdicts.expected: MORFAC03 is mooring dolphin. It is used as a mooring dolphin. Required geometry: mooring facility/buoy symbol. Required colours: black. Expected visual contract: A mooring dolphin point symbol should be a simple square/block witness, preserving black outline and land/tan fill cue.
verdicts.judge_comments: Visual rerun pass only. Stroke weight and fill shade are Helm style differences; do not mark final human approval.
verdicts.observed: Candidate is a compact square with heavy black outline and land/tan fill. This matches the S-101 square witness and the OpenCPN tiny square/dot semantic better than the previous ladder/ring substitution.
verdicts.required_change: No repair required for this visual rerun; keep pending final approval QA and do not mark final-approved.

verdicts.expected: MORFAC04 is deviation mooring dolphin. It is used as a mooring facility. Required geometry: mooring facility/buoy symbol. Required colours: black. Expected visual contract: Deviation mooring dolphin should be the narrow mast/trestle witness, not a buoy, ring, or ladder-frame substitute.
verdicts.judge_comments: Visual rerun pass only. Geometry class and variant are correct; no final approval implied.
verdicts.observed: Candidate is a narrow trapezoid/trestle with center pole and baseline, matching the S-101/OpenCPN deviation mooring dolphin witness.
verdicts.required_change: No repair required for this visual rerun; keep pending final approval QA and do not mark final-approved.

verdicts.expected: MSTCON04 is mast. It is used as a mast. Required geometry: symbol silhouette must match the strongest S-101/OpenCPN/Aqua Map reference. Required colours: reference-defined. Expected visual contract: Mast should be a tall narrow triangular/needle mast with base/ring marker in the non-conspicuous brown/land colour family.
verdicts.judge_comments: Visual rerun pass only. Candidate preserves semantic shape, variant, and colour family.
verdicts.observed: Candidate is the brown mast/needle silhouette with base ring and side baseline. It matches the S-101/OpenCPN mast witness and fixes the prior simple-line failure.
verdicts.required_change: No repair required for this visual rerun; keep pending final approval QA and do not mark final-approved.

verdicts.expected: MSTCON14 is conspicuous mast. It is used as a conspicuous mast. Required geometry: symbol silhouette must match the strongest S-101/OpenCPN/Aqua Map reference. Required colours: black. Expected visual contract: Conspicuous mast should use the same mast geometry as MSTCON04 but in black/conspicuous treatment.
verdicts.judge_comments: Visual rerun pass only. Candidate preserves semantic shape, conspicuous variant, and black colour.
verdicts.observed: Candidate is the black conspicuous mast/needle silhouette with base ring and side baseline. It matches the S-101/OpenCPN conspicuous mast witness.
verdicts.required_change: No repair required for this visual rerun; keep pending final approval QA and do not mark final-approved.

verdicts.expected: POSGEN04 is position of an elevation or control point. It is used as a position of an elevation or control point. Required geometry: symbol silhouette must match the strongest S-101/OpenCPN/Aqua Map reference. Required colours: black. Expected visual contract: Position/elevation/control point should be a single black circular ring only.
verdicts.judge_comments: Visual rerun pass only. Stroke weight is a style difference; the safety/semantic invariant is the plain single ring.
verdicts.observed: Candidate is a single plain black ring with no inner dot, extra ring, or triangle. It matches the requested POSGEN04 simplification and the S-101/OpenCPN ring witness, though the Helm stroke is lighter than S-101.
verdicts.required_change: No repair required for this visual rerun; keep pending final approval QA and do not mark final-approved.

verdicts.expected: UWTROC03 is dangerous underwater rock of uncertain depth. It is used as a dangerous underwater rock of uncertain depth. Required geometry: recognized rock/underwater rock symbol, not a generic mountain or star. Required colours: black. Expected visual contract: Dangerous underwater rock of uncertain depth should preserve the dotted hazard perimeter, blue fill, and central cross/plus cue.
verdicts.judge_comments: Visual rerun pass only. Correct rock hazard family and colour semantics.
verdicts.observed: Candidate shows blue/danger-depth fill, black dotted perimeter, and central black plus/cross, matching the S-101 dangerous underwater rock witness.
verdicts.required_change: No repair required for this visual rerun; keep pending final approval QA and do not mark final-approved.

verdicts.expected: UWTROC04 is rock which covers and uncovers or is awash at low water. It is used as a rock which covers and uncovers or is awash at low water. Required geometry: recognized rock/underwater rock symbol, not a generic mountain or star. Required colours: black. Expected visual contract: Awash/covers-and-uncovers rock should be the recognized black X/asterisk plus horizontal stroke.
verdicts.judge_comments: Visual rerun pass only. Correct underwater-rock variant and black treatment.
verdicts.observed: Candidate is the black awash-rock asterisk/X with horizontal stroke, matching S-101/OpenCPN and avoiding generic mountain/rock art.
verdicts.required_change: No repair required for this visual rerun; keep pending final approval QA and do not mark final-approved.

verdicts.expected: WRECKS01 is wreck showing any portion of hull or superstructure at level of chart datum. It is used as a wreck showing any portion of hull or superstructure at level of chart datum. Required geometry: recognized wreck symbol, not a generic decorative icon. Required colours: reference-defined. Expected visual contract: WRECKS01 should be the exposed wreck/hull-superstructure cue: low horizontal hull, sloped wreckage/mast shape, black/day treatment, and no invented circular aperture or generic sail triangle.
verdicts.judge_comments: Failing conservatively because WRECKS variants are safety/semantic-sensitive and this can be confused with a stylized generic sail/wreck pictogram rather than the standard WRECKS01 witness.
verdicts.observed: Candidate is in the exposed-wreck family, but it still introduces a large filled triangular sail/superstructure and a white circular aperture at the hull baseline. The S-101/OpenCPN WRECKS01 witness is a low exposed wreck/hull-superstructure silhouette without that white circle.
verdicts.required_change: Remove the white circular aperture and redraw closer to the S-101/OpenCPN WRECKS01 exposed-wreck silhouette: low horizontal hull plus sloped wreckage/mast, without a generic filled sail triangle.

verdicts.expected: WRECKS04 is non-dangerous wreck, depth unknown. It is used as a non-dangerous wreck, depth unknown. Required geometry: recognized wreck symbol, not a generic decorative icon. Required colours: black. Expected visual contract: WRECKS04 should be the non-dangerous wreck, depth unknown hash/fence geometry in black.
verdicts.judge_comments: Visual rerun pass only. Correct wreck variant and black colour.
verdicts.observed: Candidate is the black hash/fence wreck mark with three vertical strokes and a horizontal stroke, matching the S-101/OpenCPN non-dangerous depth-unknown wreck witness.
verdicts.required_change: No repair required for this visual rerun; keep pending final approval QA and do not mark final-approved.

verdicts.expected: WRECKS05 is dangerous wreck, depth unknown. It is used as a dangerous wreck, depth unknown. Required geometry: recognized wreck symbol, not a generic decorative icon. Required colours: black. Expected visual contract: WRECKS05 should be the dangerous wreck, depth unknown symbol with blue hazard fill, dotted boundary, and internal hash/grid wreck cue.
verdicts.judge_comments: Visual rerun pass only. Shape is close enough for semantic rerun; final human approval can decide whether the oval should be tightened further.
verdicts.observed: Candidate shows blue/danger-depth fill, dotted perimeter, horizontal bar, and vertical hatch/grid strokes. It matches the S-101/OpenCPN dangerous wreck depth-unknown family; the Helm outline is rounder but semantic variant is clear.
verdicts.required_change: No repair required for this visual rerun; keep pending final approval QA and do not mark final-approved.
